title: minuartia nuttallii subsp. fragilis
intro: Minuartia nuttallii subsp. fragilis, also known as the Nuttall's sandwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Minuartia nuttallii subsp. fragilis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
